testcase.name: test_download_stats_admin_only
testcase.failure: tests/test_iteration103_waiting_download.py:177: in test_download_stats_admin_only assert response.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200, got 403: {"detail":"Admin access required"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
